creator: marquis@roble.com
text:
> But it is not an Bourne Shell script (sh), rules_du_jour is written for bash
> and it should be run with "bash -x"

I see, thanks Michael.  Although 'sh -x' and 'sh -n' used to work, and
should ideally still work, the use of bash-specific syntax has broken
this compatibility.

Nothing the port maintainer can do at this point, unless he/she has
any influence over the rules_du_jour author.  It is unfortunate that
the script has become less cross-platform compatible in this manner.

Roger
